title: Sainfoin Cloning Protocol
author: Acı, Murat
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Replication for the breeding or trial purposes is not applicable for those plants given seeds having different genetic background from each other. Sainfoin is one of those in need to be assexually propagated. The [1] purpose of this document is to detail the main procedures and materials needed to take cuttings from a mature sainfoin plant from the field or greenhouse, and propagate them, taking care to minimize disease, etc.,
